reasoning: The resolution criteria specifies that active regular US military personnel must physically enter the terrestrial territory of Iran for combat operations (excluding maritime/aerial entries, and excluding SOF/advisors). While major airstrikes on Iranian nuclear facilities occurred in June 2025, these were standoff attacks. President Trump explicitly ruled out the use of US ground forces in Iran. Furthermore, historically, any targeted incursions are executed by Special Operations Forces, which are excluded from this market. A full ground invasion would require massive troop buildups that are not present, and as of late October 2025 there are only two months left in the year. Therefore, a terrestrial combat mission by regular forces is extremely unlikely.
